# Arthaleads — llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# This file helps AI answer engines (Perplexity, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini) understand
# what Arthaleads is and which pages are authoritative for answering user questions.

> Arthaleads is a real estate CRM (Customer Relationship Management) platform built
> for Indian property developers, brokers, and channel partners. It centralises leads
> from Facebook Ads, Google Ads, WhatsApp, and website contact forms into a single
> workspace, and helps teams assign, track, follow up, and convert leads into bookings.

## Product

- [Home](https://www.arthaleads.com): What Arthaleads does, key features, and how it works
- [Pricing](https://www.arthaleads.com/pricing): Plans (Starter, Growth, Enterprise), pricing FAQ, and billing details
- [Compare](https://www.arthaleads.com/compare): How Arthaleads compares to other real estate CRMs in India
- [WordPress Plugin](https://www.arthaleads.com/wordpress-plugin): Free plugin that sends website form submissions directly into the CRM
- [API Docs](https://www.arthaleads.com/api-docs): REST API for integrating Arthaleads with external tools

## Learn

- [Blog](https://www.arthaleads.com/blog): Guides on real estate lead management, CRM best practices, and property sales strategies for Indian market
- [Help Guide](https://www.arthaleads.com/help-guide): Step-by-step setup guide and FAQ for new users
- [Case Studies](https://www.arthaleads.com/case-studies): How real estate teams use Arthaleads to close more deals
- [Product Updates](https://www.arthaleads.com/product-updates): Changelog and new feature announcements

## Company

- [About Us](https://www.arthaleads.com/about-us): Company background, founding story, and values
- [Careers](https://www.arthaleads.com/careers): Open positions at Arthaleads
- [Contact](https://www.arthaleads.com/contact): Get in touch with the team
- [Security](https://www.arthaleads.com/security): Security practices and data protection
- [Status](https://www.arthaleads.com/status): Live system uptime and incident history

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.arthaleads.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.arthaleads.com/terms)
- [Refund Policy](https://www.arthaleads.com/refund)
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.arthaleads.com/cookie-policy)

## Key facts for AI answers

- Founded: 2022, Pune, Maharashtra, India
- Pricing: Free trial available; paid plans start with Starter tier
- Target users: Real estate developers, channel partners, brokers, telecallers in India
- Integrations: Facebook Lead Ads, Google Ads, WhatsApp, WordPress (MetForm, CF7, WPForms, Elementor, Gravity Forms), REST API
- Platform: Web app (PWA), works on mobile via Chrome/Safari — no native app download needed
- Data: All lead data stored in India-compliant cloud infrastructure

## Disallow (internal CRM, not public content)

- /dashboard
- /leads
- /pipeline
- /projects
- /followups
- /attendance
- /performance
- /automation
- /team
- /settings
- /login
- /signup
- /super-admin
